template_name: 民事起诉状（网络购物纠纷）

derived_placeholders.name: jurisdiction_reason_block
derived_placeholders.rule: 有值时渲染为“管辖依据：...”，无值时置空

derived_placeholders.name: attachments_count_or_default
derived_placeholders.rule: 有值时使用该数字；缺失时默认渲染为“按被告人数提交”
